programme.title: Under the Autumn Moon
programme.desc: When an executive convinces her boss that a ranch would be perfect for their company retreats, he agrees to let her check it out. Her plan hits a snag when the owner refuses to sell unless she can promise to preserve its history.

programme.title: Love Takes Flight
programme.desc: In the Hallmark Hall of Fame Presentation, a young girl befriends a lonely widower as a part of her Mission: Find a Friend, uniting their families in a healing twist of fate. Stars Nikki DeLoach and Jeff Hephner.

programme.title: Dating the Delaneys
programme.desc: Three generations of Delaney women explore the highs and lows of modern-day dating, learning that love and romance can be found at any age…and sometimes where you least expect it. Stars Rachel Boston and Paul Campbell.

programme.title: Guiding Emily
programme.desc: Emily's life changes after losing her eyesight, while a guide dog struggles with training. Through a series of missed encounters both overcome their obstacles and find each other. Stars Sarah Drew, Antonio Cupo, Eric McCormack.

programme.title: Love in Paradise
programme.desc: When a Western movie star is forced to spend a PR weekend at a dude ranch, his fans are horrified to learn he's actually a city slicker who's afraid of horses and has never been west of the Hudson River. Stars Luke Perry.

programme.title: A Ring by Spring
programme.desc: A fiercely independent single woman is forced to consider marrying her not-so-perfect boyfriend when a gypsy fortuneteller convinces her she must be engaged by the spring or risk a lifetime alone.

programme.title: Wedding Every Weekend
programme.desc: Nate and Brooke are going to the same four weddings, four weekends in a row. To avoid set-ups, they go together as "wedding buddies." But what starts as a friendship soon becomes deeper. Stars Kimberley Sustad, Paul Campbell.

programme.title: Love Blossoms
programme.desc: Perfumer Violet is desperate to formulate her late father's unfinished signature scent. Under great pressure to finish by Valentine's Day, Violet hires an inexperienced botanist with an uncanny ability to identify scents.

programme.title: All of My Heart
programme.desc: A young caterer's life suddenly changes when she inherits a country home and learns she must share it with a career-obsessed Wall Street trader. Sparks fly when they have to work side-by-side.

programme.title: All of My Heart: Inn Love
programme.desc: Brian and Jenny are engaged and preparing for the grand opening of their bed and breakfast. But when a big storm hits Bucks County, all their plans end up sopping wet.

programme.title: All of My Heart: The Wedding
programme.desc: Brian and Jenny are planning their wedding at the Inn where they fell in love. When a distant relative arrives and stakes their claim to the Inn, Brian and Jenny must find a way to save their beloved Inn or risk having to sell.

programme.title: Crossword Mysteries: A Puzzle to Die For
programme.desc: After several of her puzzles are linked to the murder of an art gallery owner, a crossword puzzle editor teams up with a no nonsense detective to stop a killer in their midst. Stars Lacey Chabert, Brennan Elliott.

programme.title: Stranded in Paradise
programme.desc: When a HR exec loses her job, she travels to Puerto Rico for a business conference. But as the trip becomes a disaster and a hurricane shuts down the whole island, she meets a handsome traveler who gives her a new perspective.

programme.title: June in January
programme.desc: A newly engaged bride's dream wedding is threatened by her scheming future mother-in-law, when a sudden change in plans pushes her perfect outdoor June wedding up to a wintry January date.

programme.title: The Beach House
programme.desc: When Cara finds her life spinning out of control, she returns to the scenic Lowcountry to visit her mother. Before long, the rhythms of the island open her heart in wonderful ways as she repairs the family beach house.

programme.title: The Sweeter Side of Life
programme.desc: Pampered Manhattan housewife Desiree Harper has it all. That is until her husband unexpectedly dumps her. Faced with an airtight prenup, Desiree reluctantly lands a job making cupcakes at her father's struggling bakery.

programme.title: Big Sky River
programme.desc: Tara needs to go back to Parable, Montana, the place that made her the happiest, in order to move forward after a messy divorce. Her handsome neighbor presents an unexpected twist. Starring Emmanuelle Vaugier, Kavan Smith.

programme.title: The Magic of Ordinary Days
programme.desc: Pregnant out of wedlock, an educated young woman is pressured by her father into an arranged marriage with a lonely farmer in this drama set during WWII. Stars Keri Russell and Skeet Ulrich.

programme.title: One Summer
programme.desc: Jack takes his son and daughter to his late wife's beachside hometown hoping to heal and become closer. The summer brings visions of the past that could forge a new path forward. Stars Sam Page, Sarah Drew and Amanda Schull.

programme.title: Pearl in Paradise
programme.desc: Alex, a photographer for a travel magazine, and Colin, a best-selling author, team up to find an elusive Fijian pearl.

programme.title: The 27-Hour Day
programme.desc: An entrepreneur takes a break from her wellness empire for some much-needed work-life balance but realizes it won't be easy. Will a relaxing retreat and new romance change her life, forever? Stars Autumn Reeser, Andrew Walker.

programme.title: The Baker's Son
programme.desc: Matt's passion transforms his bread from bland to extraordinary. When his bread loses its magic, the island locals panic and turn to Annie, Matt's childhood friend and true love for help. Stars Eloise Mumford, Brant Daugherty.

programme.title: The Stars Between Us
programme.desc: Seven years ago, Kim made a connection with a stranger during an eclipse event. Now a fledgling news reporter, Kim returns to Illinois for this year's eclipse, unaware that their paths may cross again. Stars Sarah Drew, Matt Long.

programme.title: Love of the Irish
programme.desc: Tired of her bad luck, Fiona takes her mom on a trip to Ireland to turn things around where she meets a charming single dad who helps her make her own luck. Stars Shenae Grimes-Beech, Stephen Hagan, Moira Kelly.

programme.title: Hearts in the Game
programme.desc: A NYC publicist helps an MLB pitcher find his way back to the game and to her heart. Starring Erin Cahill and Marco Grazzini.

programme.title: Betty's Bad Luck in Love
programme.desc: Cursed from childhood to fail at romance, Betty's relationships have always ended in disaster. But when she meets Alex, she's tempted to try once more. Can true love prevail over a curse? Stars Laci J. Mailey, Marco Grazzini.

programme.title: The Perfect Setting
programme.desc: An aspiring jewelry designer returns to Belgium to visit her grandfather and hopefully win the Valentines Day Diamond Contest. Stars Laci J. Mailey, David Elsendoorn.

programme.title: Love, Romance & Chocolate
programme.desc: Emma and chocolatier Luc compete for Belgium's Royal Chocolatier. The beauty and romance of Bruges inspire unique chocolate combinations, but will their entry win without them losing their hearts? Stars Lacey Chabert, Will Kemp.

programme.title: The Wedding Veil
programme.desc: After discovering a long-lost painting, museum curator Avery and new board member Peter investigate the artwork's origins as they plan a gala to unveil it. Stars Lacey Chabert, Kevin McGarry, Autumn Reeser, Alison Sweeney.

programme.title: Romance at Hope Ranch
programme.desc: Hope Morgan sets out to begin a new chapter of her life—fulfilling her childhood dream of running a ranch in the picturesque town of Ruidoso, New Mexico and reviving the beloved Giddy Up Gala. Stars Alison Sweeney, Gabriel Hogan.

programme.title: Paris, Wine & Romance
programme.desc: Isabella travels to Paris to compete in a major wine competition. While there she meets, Jacque, a competitor who shows her the city of love and teaches her about how wine is more than just a business. Jen Lilley, Dan Jeannotte.

programme.title: A Little Daytime Drama
programme.desc: In order to save her daytime soap drama from cancellation, head writer Maggie must convince Darin, fan favorite actor and her real-life ex-boyfriend, to return to the show. Stars Jen Lilley, Ryan Paevey, Linda Dano.

programme.title: Appetite for Love
programme.desc: Mina has everything going for her, but her world is suddenly turned upside down when work sends her to her hometown in Tennessee to convince an old, stubborn restaurant owner to sell his property.

programme.title: The Perfect Catch
programme.desc: When her high school boyfriend, a superstar baseball player, returns to town, a single-parent finds the inspiration to reinvent her struggling diner... and revisits the past to find something even better for the future.

programme.title: Home Turf
programme.desc: Cassidy is the president of a small college whose life is thrown for a loop when freshmen on the football team move into her home. Can Logan, the handsome coach, help smooth things over? Stars Nikki DeLoach, Warren Christie.

programme.title: Autumn Dreams
programme.desc: A young couple's spur of the moment marriage is immediately annulled by the bride's parents. Years later, they discover that a glitch in the paperwork means they are still husband and wife.

programme.title: Hearts of Winter
programme.desc: An interior designer brings new life to the house of a widower and his daughter and finds love in the process. Stars Jill Wagner, Victor Webster, Rukiya Bernard.

programme.title: Love on the Slopes
programme.desc: NYC-based editor, Alex, is sent to an extreme sports outpost, to write a story. At first, she fails at everything, much to the chagrin of Cole, an extreme sports enthusiast who thinks this city girl should head back to New York.

programme.title: The Story of Us
programme.desc: Jamie learns that her first love Sawyer is the architect of a development that wants to change her beloved neighborhood and threatens her bookstore. Can old Valentines help them see eye to eye? Starring Maggie Lawson and Sam Page.

programme.title: Love on the Danube: Love Song
programme.desc: Fellow cruise passengers, Sarah and Jack, play matchmaker with their music loving widowed parents, as they cruise down the Danube visiting European cities. Stars Nazneen Contractor, Wes Brown, Kathryn Drysdale, Catherine Disher.

programme.title: Christmas with the Darlings
programme.desc: When an assistant gives her final notice, she is drawn into helping the charming, younger brother of her wealthy boss as he looks after his orphaned nieces and nephew through Christmas. Stars Katrina Law and Carlo Marks.

programme.title: The More the Merrier
programme.desc: During a Christmas Eve blizzard, ER Doctor, Alice, and newly hired cardiologist, Brian, team up to deliver four babies while spreading holiday joy for the patients and hospital staff. Stars Rachel Boston, Brendan Penny.

programme.title: Deck the Halls on Cherry Lane
programme.desc: We're back for another Christmas on 7 Cherry Lane, this time in 1966, 1981, and 2000. Stars John Brotherton, Erin Cahill, Brooke D'Orsay, Chelsea Hobbs, Ben Hollingsworth, Sam Page.

programme.title: The Christmas Doctor
programme.desc: Zoey is a traveling doctor who prefers short assignments to staying put, so when she is assigned to a small town clinic for the holidays, she is surprised when she starts to feel at home. Stars Holly Robinson Peete, Adrian Holmes.

programme.title: Christmas Next Door
programme.desc: Eric Randall, an author of bachelor lifestyle books, is left in charge of his niece and nephew for the holidays. Eric turns to his friend April, a lover of all things Christmas, for help. Stars Jesse Metcalfe and Fiona Gublemann.

programme.title: The Snow Must Go On
programme.desc: A former Broadway star agrees to direct his niece's high school Christmas musical in the hopes of impressing an influential Broadway producer. Stars Heather Hemmens, Corey Cott.

programme.title: Our Holiday Story
programme.desc: A loving couple shares the story of how they met and fell in love when their daughter's boyfriend comes to meet them for the first time at Christmas. Starring Nikki DeLoach and Warren Christie.

programme.title: A Royal Montana Christmas
programme.desc: Overwhelmed by her royal duties, Princess Victoria visits Big Sky Country for Christmas and meets her dashing guide at the ranch. She must decide if love is worth leaving her royal life behind. Fiona Gubelmann, Warren Christie.

programme.title: 'Tis the Season to Be Irish
programme.desc: Rose tries to flip a house in Ireland but is blocked by Sean, a handsome local who wants to preserve the historic cottage. Stars Fiona Gubelmann, Eion Macken.

programme.title: Home for Christmas Day
programme.desc: When a young woman falls in love and develops a long-distance relationship with a soldier in active duty, her protective mother tries her best to steer her daughter away from heartache.

programme.title: A Glenbrooke Christmas
programme.desc: Longing to be accepted for herself and not just her wealth, an heiress heads to the small town of Glenbrooke, where she discovers the joys of a simple Christmas, community, and maybe even love. Stars Autumn Reeser, Antonio Cupo.

programme.title: We Met in December
programme.desc: After a magical night sharing hopes, dreams, and a perfect kiss, strangers Annie and Dave lose each other with no way to connect. They embark on a quest to find each other by Christmas. Stars Autumn Reeser, Niall Matter.

programme.title: Cross Country Christmas
programme.desc: Former classmates Lina and Max are traveling home for the holidays, until a storm hits and they have to work together to make it home in time, no matter the mode of transportation. Stars Rachael Leigh Cook, Greyston Holt.

programme.title: The Sweetest Christmas
programme.desc: A struggling pastry chef must embrace the Christmas spirit or risk losing both the contest and a second chance at love. Stars Lacey Chabert and Lea Coco.

programme.title: Christmas Island
programme.desc: When a snowstorm diverts Kate's first private flight en route to Switzerland to Christmas Island, she must team up with an air traffic controller to secure her dream job as the family's pilot. Stars Rachel Skarsten, Andrew Walker.

programme.title: Three Wise Men and a Baby
programme.desc: Three brothers get the surprise of their lives when they are forced to work together and care for a baby over the holidays. Starring Paul Campbell, Tyler Hynes, Andrew Walker, and Margaret Colin.

programme.title: Three Wiser Men and a Boy (Extended Cut)
programme.desc: The Brenner brothers are back and putting on a holiday pageant for young Thomas while trying to cope with life's curveballs, including their mom's new boyfriend. Stars Paul Campbell, Tyler Hynes, Andrew Walker, Margaret Colin.

programme.title: Three Wisest Men (Extended Cut)
programme.desc: As life pushes the family in different directions, the Brenner boys decide they need to put on the Best Christmas Ever to bring everyone back together. (Paul Campbell, Tyler Hynes, Andrew Walker, Margaret Colin)

programme.title: Christmas by Starlight
programme.desc: When her family's beloved eatery, The Starlight Café, is slated for demolition, Annie vows to put a stop to it before Christmas. Stars Paul Campbell and Kimberley Sustad.

programme.title: The Santa Class
programme.desc: Kate North, the owner of a struggling Santa School, and her instructor, Dan, must help an amnesia-stricken Santa Claus regain his memories to save Christmas and hopefully her school as well. Stars Kimberley Sustad, Benjamin Ayres.

programme.title: Ships in the Night: A Martha's Vineyard Mystery
programme.desc: When an art gallery robbery leads to the death of the contemptible gallery manager, former Boston detective teams up with local doctor--and old flame-- to catch the killer. Stars Jesse Metcalfe and Sarah Lind.

programme.title: Poisoned in Paradise: A Martha's Vineyard Mystery
programme.desc: When a local waitress is found dead on the beach and a mysterious deposit appears in Zee's bank account, Martha's Vineyard proves to be all but the simple, scenic life Jeff Jackson was after. Stars Jesse Metcalfe and Sarah Lind.

programme.title: Mystery Island: Pilot
programme.desc: When a visit to a mystery-themed resort goes wrong, a local detective and a vacationing British criminal psychiatrist team up to solve a real murder. Starring Elizabeth Henstridge, Charlie Weber.

programme.title: Haunted Harmony Mysteries: Murder in G Major
programme.desc: A new teacher at an Irish prep school is shocked to find a ghost haunting her house. She decides to help solve his murder in the hopes that it will allow him to move on. Stars Tamera Mowry-Housley, Risteard Cooper, Marco Grazzini.

programme.title: Haunted Harmony Mysteries: Buried at C
programme.desc: Our favorite music teacher Gethsemane is back again along with her trusted ghost friend Eamon to solve the unexplained death of a sea captain. Stars Tamera Mowry-Housley, Risteard Cooper, and Marco Grazzini.

programme.title: The Cases of Mystery Lane: Pilot
programme.desc: Birdie and Alden Case find a way to keep the mystery in their marriage alive, literally, when the amateur sleuths are pulled into a murder investigation. Stars Aimee Garcia, Paul Campbell.

programme.title: The Cases of Mystery Lane: Death is Listening
programme.desc: As Birdie and Alden Case's relationship strengthens, they discover a mutual interest for True Crime. But when their favorite podcaster is found dead, it is up to The Cases to listen to the clues. Stars Aimee Garcia, Paul Campbell.

programme.title: To Catch a Spy
programme.desc: A travel writer witnesses a murder at a hotel in Malta and becomes ensnared in a web of intrigue and espionage as she tries to find the killer before the killer finds her. Stars Nathalie Kelley, Colin Donnell and Patti Murin.

programme.title: Aurora Teagarden Mysteries: A Bone to Pick
programme.desc: A librarian with a sharp mind for murder, Aurora Teagarden is known around her small town as a master sleuth. When her friend Jane dies and leaves Aurora everything in her will, she also leaves a troubling murder mystery.

programme.title: Aurora Teagarden Mysteries: Real Murders
programme.desc: Aurora finds a member of her crime buff group, the Real Murders Club, killed in a manner that eerily resembles the crime the club was about to discuss. As other brutal "copycat" killings follow, Aurora will have to investigate.

programme.title: Aurora Teagarden Mysteries: Three Bedrooms, One Corpse
programme.desc: When Aurora pitches in to help her busy real estate mother she quickly realizes she has again walked into a life or death situation. She investigates when the body of a local realtor is found strangled in a backyard.

programme.title: Tipline Mysteries: Dial 1 for Murder
programme.desc: A cryptic call about a planned jewelry heist draws a Detroit Free Press tipline operator, Maddie Moore, into a dangerous homicide case alongside a newly promoted detective. Stars Holland Roden and Chris McNally.

programme.title: Nelly Knows Mysteries: A Fatal Engagement
programme.desc: When advice columnist NELLY finds her childhood friend DAHLIA's boyfriend dead, she joins DETECTIVE HOGAN to help find the killer. However, as suspicions creep in, Dahlia becomes a prime suspect. Stars Pascale Hutton, Kavan Smith.

programme.title: Redemption in Cherry Springs
programme.desc: After fallout from a story, reporter Melanie goes home to Cherry Springs for a break. When a friend disappears, she uses her skills to get to the truth, to the local detective's dismay. Stars Rochelle Aytes and Keith Robinson.

programme.title: Murder, She Baked: A Chocolate Chip Cookie Mystery
programme.desc: Free spirited cookie baker Hannah Swensen jumps in to help a handsome new detective track down the culprit and uncover the mystery surrounding the death of her friend and local milk delivery man. Stars Alison Sweeney.

programme.title: Murder, She Baked: A Plum Pudding Mystery
programme.desc: When a murder takes place at the local Christmas tree carnival, it seems there are quite a few suspects. With the twelve days of Christmas ticking away, Hannah's running out of time to nab a murderous Scrooge.

programme.title: Murder, She Baked: A Peach Cobbler Mystery
programme.desc: With The Cookie Jar, Hannah Swensen has a mouthwatering monopoly on the bakery business of Lake Eden, Minnesota. But when a rival store opens, and one of the owners is found dead, Hannah is determined to prove she isn't guilty.

programme.title: Murder, She Baked: A Deadly Recipe
programme.desc: Bakery owner Hannah Swensen just can't keep her hands out of the batter when murder stirs things up in Lake Eden, Minnesota, leaving the sheriff dead, a deputy accused, and a killer on the loose. Stars Alison Sweeney.

programme.title: Murder, She Baked: Just Desserts
programme.desc: Hannah is thrilled when she is chosen as a guest for the first Eden Lake Dessert Bake-Off, but when a fellow judge is found murdered, Hannah takes it upon herself to find the killer. Stars Alison Sweeney, Cameron Mathison.

programme.title: Poison in a Pear Tree - Part 1
programme.desc: Christmas shop owner Emily Lane uses secret skills to investigate a murder when a poisoned cookie links her to the crime. Detective Sam Wilner navigates the holidays with daughter Violet. Stars Sarah Drew and Peter Mooney.
